    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class io.github.lukagg13.hotelmanagementapp.Launcher
    Main method to start the app
    mapper(Function) - Method in class io.github.lukagg13.hotelmanagementapp.ui.component.Modal.ModalBuilder
    Sets the mapper function for getting the result from the controller.
    Modal<C,R> - Class in io.github.lukagg13.hotelmanagementapp.ui.component
    Class used to display a modal view in the app.
    Modal.ModalBuilder<C,R> - Class in io.github.lukagg13.hotelmanagementapp.ui.component
    Builder class used for creating Modal objects.
    ModalBuilder(ViewManager.ViewPath) - Constructor for class io.github.lukagg13.hotelmanagementapp.ui.component.Modal.ModalBuilder
    Return a new Modal.ModalBuilder object.
    modality(Modality) - Method in class io.github.lukagg13.hotelmanagementapp.ui.component.Modal.ModalBuilder
    Sets the modality of the Modal.
